title: Dead Code, Unused Dependencies, and Reachability · Policy Clinic: Unused Symbols
summary: Remove unreachable code and dependencies with evidence rather than guesswork. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates unused symbols increment in a dead-code and dependency audit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Treat unused imports, variables, parameters, private members, and exports according to language semantics.
Test boundary values and downstream behavior instead of only constant equality.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
